title: Backend Development
description: Robust, scalable server-side applications built with modern frameworks and best practices. From API design to database architecture, I build backends that perform reliably under real-world conditions.

title: Full Stack Applications
description: End-to-end web applications with clean frontends and powerful backends. I handle the complete development lifecycle from planning and architecture to deployment and maintenance.

title: Business Automation
description: Intelligent automation systems that eliminate repetitive tasks, reduce errors, and free your team to focus on high-value work. Built with reliability and maintainability in mind.

title: Admin Dashboards
description: Custom admin panels and dashboards that give you complete visibility and control over your operations. Built with role-based access and real-time data visualization.

title: AI Integration
description: Practical AI solutions integrated into your existing systems. From intelligent chatbots to automated content generation and data analysis — AI that adds real value to your business.
